home.heroTitle: Turn cars and spaces into advertising opportunities.
home.heroSubtitle: BrandRideArmenia connects companies with real-world advertising spaces like cars, buildings, shop windows and more.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to start earning from your unused advertising space.
home.forSpaceOwners: How it works for space owners
home.step1Desc: Add your car, wall, or shop window in minutes. Set your price and availability.
home.step2Desc: Brands browse listings and contact you when they find a fit.
home.step3Desc: Get paid monthly. We handle the platform; you provide the space.
home.advertiserStep1Desc: Describe what you need: location, budget, duration, and type of space.
home.advertiserStep2Desc: Space owners and we help you find the right locations.
home.advertiserStep3Desc: Contact owners, agree on terms, and start your campaign.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find or list spaces by type.
home.noListings: No listings yet. Be the first to add one!
home.ctaSubtitle: List your car, building, or shop window and let brands find you.

about.title: About BrandRideArmenia
about.intro: BrandRideArmenia is a marketplace connecting businesses with real-world advertising spaces across Armenia. List your car, building, shop window, or wall and earn passive income while brands get visible, local reach.
about.belief: We believe every surface can tell a story. Whether you own a vehicle, a building facade, or a storefront, you can turn it into an opportunity—and we make it simple.
